text.title: Semantic XML Content — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for authoring one content/*.xml file from concept to committed file.

step.name: pick-concept
step.action: Identify one self-contained concept (rule set, output contract, failure modes, etc.). One concept → one file.
step.decision-gate: If concept needs > 150 lines, split it now.

step.name: choose-tags
step.action: Map each block to a glossary tag. If no fit, evaluate the glossary-update path; reuse before inventing.

step.name: draft-from-skeleton
step.action: Fill the skeleton. Root ``. First child `` one sentence.

step.name: escape-and-cdata
step.action: Wrap every code block in CDATA. Escape `&`, `<`, `>` in element text. Parse with `xml.etree.ElementTree.parse()` to verify well-formedness.

step.name: cross-link
step.action: Add `` with `` to sibling files in the same methodology. Run validator script.
